message:
fix(ci): disable submodule checkout in release workflow

The release workflow used `submodules: recursive` in the build job's
checkout step, but `legacy_pi_mono_code/pi-mono` is registered as a
git submodule (mode 160000) without a corresponding `.gitmodules` entry.
This caused `actions/checkout` to fail with:

  fatal: No url found for submodule path 'legacy_pi_mono_code/pi-mono'
  in .gitmodules

The fix changes `submodules: recursive` to `submodules: false`. The
existing "Ensure submodule content exists" step already creates a stub
file for `include_str!()` compilation when the submodule is absent.

Closes #34

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -137,7 +137,7 @@ jobs:
           path: pi_agent_rust
           fetch-depth: 0
           ref: ${{ needs.plan.outputs.tag }}
-          submodules: recursive
+          submodules: false
 
       - name: Ensure submodule content exists
         run: |
